purpose: Attempt a uniform row-to-G900/P900 lift for all 18 WXYZTI role rows using P900 vertices, edge-law tables, and combined-edge layers.
boundary: This is not a G900 lift proof.
The same lift logic is applied to all 18 role rows.
Residual rows are not targeted during lift construction.
Any separation found here is a candidate diagnostic, not a closure rule.

interpretation.main_result: A uniform G900/P900 row lift was attempted for all 18 WXYZTI role rows.
interpretation.if_separated: If residual rows separate by a lifted feature, that supports the quotient-artifact hypothesis but does not close Gap A.
interpretation.if_not_separated: If residual rows do not separate, the G900 lift attempt does not explain the two residuals at this schema level.
interpretation.what_remains_open: A stronger lift may require orientation, directed edge identity, or source-side K900 transport not exposed by this schema.
interpretation.next_question: Should we test directed/oriented P900 edge lifts, or freeze Gap A as bounded partial with a failed first G900-lift explanation?
